response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with 19 years of demonstrated software engineering across diverse domains and has shipped products successfully. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role specifically requires deep AI expertise and strategic technology direction, which the resume does not demonstrate. Current role in AI infrastructure (2 months) is a recent and relevant exposure but insufficient evidence of the AI strategy focus and thought leadership this role demands. Strong technical foundation and learning ability suggest potential, but the AI specialization gap is significant.
strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Strong technical depth demonstrated through multiple open-source projects with real adoption (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and shipped products ranked in top 10 app stores
Recently engaged in AI infrastructure work at current role, including MCP frameworks and agentic workflows, indicating emerging focus on AI technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product expertise, research, or strategy track record—AI involvement is limited to recent infrastructure tooling work

Limited evidence of strategic organizational leadership or technology direction-setting; career shows strong individual contributor and senior engineer roles but not director-level strategic influence
Lacks preferred Master's or PhD in AI-related field and has no background in AI-focused companies or roles prior to current position (April 2025)

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and strategic focus gap
Limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership
